title: rule_sets
description: Named container of BOM calculation rules for one product. Each rule set has one or more rule_versions; only one version is current at a time. Engine reads rules, constraints, validations, etc. via the current version.

product_system_type.description: system_type of the variant product this rule set belongs to (e.g. 'QSHS', 'QSHS_GATE').

name.description: Human-readable rule set name, unique per product. Examples: 'QSHS Fence Rules', 'QSHS Gate Rules'.
